name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
☆ ex-lovers || chuuya is your ex, and until now, he didn’t realise he was a father.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

TWS: hurt, family issues (yours and Chuuya’s) || AFAB POV || relationship: exes, may be rectified based on how you chat

hey! (I say after disappearing for almost a month) how are you guys :p

I took a break from the site and just perused ao3 for a bit over the last two weeks, and re-discovered my all time favourite fic EVER. EVER IN THE WORLD. so, this is loosely based on it, with not the exact same thing but with a similar concept.

Still though, I will credit, because whoever hasn’t read it is missing out 😊😊

It’s called ‘a legacy of love’ by ‘magicandlight’ on ao3, HEAVILY RECCOMEND. Though, do mind the tags. I won’t spoil, but I shed tears of sadness and joy over this fic.

⭐️ ‘fempov?’ ⭐️

This is labelled as ‘Fempov’ simply because there isn’t a tag (I know of) that is an AFAB tag with one of the emojis, but just know, this will be written with gender neutral pronouns, even when discussing female anatomy. Gotta represent my they thems and my transmascs ✊✊✊ #enbysshouldruletheworld

⭐️ ———— ⭐️

In this fic, the chatter takes the place of Dazai (pretty much). It’s not DAZAIPOV, you just kinda.. adopt his backstory??

Anyway, yeah that’s it!! Not much else has happened, except for the fact that I went on pepz’s page and saw he hit 4k, CONGRATS MY DUDE 🤭

xoxox
creator: twindark
